silhouette: Bright sharp-pointed teardrop silhouette with a noticeably fuller, rounder body than Padarana.
face: Open eyes, eager smile, highly expressive default read.
body_language: Social, animated, first to jump into action or trends.
do_not_change: Keep her visually energetic, fuller-bodied, and lively.
Do not flatten her expression into generic neutrality.
Use her face to carry momentum and hype.
Do not slim her into Padarana, sharpen her into Nia, quiet her into Snacri, or soften her into Muci.
